questions.prompt: Which S3 storage class is best for archival with retrieval times of hours?
questions.explanation: S3 Glacier is designed for archival.

questions.prompt: Which service provides a scalable file system for Linux workloads?
questions.explanation: Amazon EFS is a managed file system.

questions.prompt: Which service provides block storage for EC2?
questions.explanation: Amazon EBS provides persistent block storage.

questions.prompt: Which S3 feature allows automatic replication of objects across regions?
questions.explanation: CRR replicates objects across AWS regions.

questions.prompt: Which service provides hybrid cloud storage integration?
questions.explanation: AWS Storage Gateway integrates on-premises with AWS storage.

questions.prompt: Which S3 feature allows multiple versions of an object to be stored?
questions.explanation: Versioning keeps multiple versions of an object.

questions.prompt: Which service provides a petabyte-scale data transfer appliance?
questions.explanation: AWS Snowball is a physical device for large data transfers.

questions.prompt: Which S3 feature reduces latency by caching content closer to users?
questions.explanation: S3 Transfer Acceleration uses CloudFront edge locations.

questions.prompt: Which storage option is best for high-performance databases on EC2?
questions.explanation: Provisioned IOPS SSD volumes are optimized for databases.

questions.prompt: Which service provides exabyte-scale data transfer via a shipping container?
questions.explanation: AWS Snowmobile is a truck-sized data transfer service.
